backlog.title: Implement Kotlin data models
backlog.notes: Create all 9 data class files in data/model/: DeviceState, SSEEvent, TileType (15 values), TileConfig, GroupConfig, ConnectionType, HsmMode, HubMode, HubVariable. Must compile cleanly.

backlog.title: Implement ConnectionResolver and SettingsRepository
backlog.notes: ConnectionResolver resolves base URL for LOCAL/CLOUD/AUTO modes (AUTO probes local with 2s timeout, falls back to cloud). SettingsRepository wraps EncryptedSharedPreferences. NetworkModule provides OkHttpClient via Hilt.

backlog.title: Implement HubitatApiService and SseClient
backlog.notes: Retrofit interface with all 10 Maker API endpoints. OkHttp SseClient with exponential backoff reconnect. ApiModule provides Retrofit and SseClient via Hilt.

backlog.title: Implement DeviceRepository and PinRepository
backlog.notes: DeviceRepository merges REST + SSE into StateFlow<Map<String,DeviceState>>, exposes hsmStatus/modes/hubVariables/connectionStatus, handles sendCommand/setHsmMode/setMode/setHubVariable. PinRepository uses jBCrypt for local PIN hash storage and verification.
